privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Maven project at /home/ga/Downloads/EnterpriseServer containing a LicenseManager class designed to require debugging for bypass. The ServerBootstrapper application writes a success log file named 'startup_success.log' to the project root containing the token 'SUCCESS_TOKEN_BYPASS_COMPLETE' when executed successfully. The protected source file is src/main/java/com/enterprise/server/LicenseManager.java, which contains a boolean variable 'isLicensed' initialized to false that must be modified at runtime via the Eclipse Debugger without editing the source code. All data is synthetically generated by the task setup scripts.
